name: lobster-assistant
description: 龙虾助手 - OpenClaw 一键部署工具

scripts.pkg:mac-app: npm run build && rm -rf bin && mkdir -p bin && npx @yao-pkg/pkg dist/index.js --targets node22-macos-arm64 --output bin/lobster-macos-arm64 && ../../scripts/build-macos-app.sh bin/lobster-macos-arm64 bin/lobster-macos-arm64-app.zip $(node -p "require('./package.json').version")
scripts.validate:release-version: node -e "const pkg = require('./package.json'); const tag = process.argv[1] || ''; const version = tag.replace(/^v/, ''); if (pkg.version !== version) { console.error('Version mismatch: package.json=' + pkg.version + ', tag=' + tag); process.exit(1); } console.log('Version validated:', pkg.version);" --
